1.name: Consecrate the Grove
1.description: Awaken the plant life in your territory to be your defense.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 461
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 232

2.name: Crimson Woad
2.description: Inscribe runes that bolster control over the Beast and add its fury to your attacks; in some traditions, runes are inscribed on a sacrifice to invoke a war-spirit and turn the user into a furious warrior.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 462
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 232

3.name: Inscribe the Curse
3.description: Write a rune of your enemy's name that curses them when they see it; some variants place the rune on the body of a mortal friend or close relative to carry the curse.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 462
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 233

4.name: Moon and Sun
4.description: Bind yourself to the spirit of the moon and sun for several benefits; some variants inscribe a rune to become immune to Rötschreck and convert fire/sun damage to lethal.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 462
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 233

5.name: Drink Dry the Earth
5.description: Gain temporary power from a site of mystical energy; some variants grant temporary Willpower and blood by absorbing the earth's energy through sacrifice, potentially attracting a Spirit Mentor at special sites.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 463
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 234

6.name: Inscribe the Forgotten Names
6.description: Summon and communicate with a mythical creature.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 463
